prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-6TOPWMNCKSNG-2PC-6-GRN-BUN Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 6" Fixed Blade Neck Chain Knife Stainless Steel with Paracord Handle and Sheath, Neon Green Description: Get ready for any adventure with the ASR Outdoor Paracord Wrapped Fixed Blade Neck Knife!

This compact 6" fixed blade hunting knife is designed for rugged outdoor use. Lightweight and easy to carry, it comes with a durable sheath attached to a neck chain for convenient transport. The vibrant green paracord handle ensures it’s easy to spot in any environment.

The handle is wrapped in high-strength survival paracord, which can be unwound for emergency use in survival situations. Crafted with a 100% stainless steel blade, this knife boasts a razor-sharp edge for reliable performance. The impact-resistant sheath provides secure storage and quick access to the blade when you need it most.

Stay prepared with the ASR Outdoor Paracord Wrapped Fixed Blade Neck Knife – a must-have for any outdoor enthusiast! Search Terms: 6" stainless steel hunting knife; paracord handle; survival knife; tactical knife; camping knife; hiking knife; green paracord; neck chain sheath; compact knife; outdoor survival; bushcraft; razor-sharp blade Features: - COMPACT FIXED BLADE DESIGN - 6" overall length, 3" stainless steel blade, perfect for hunting and outdoor use, ensuring durability and a razor-sharp edge. - PARACORD WRAPPED HANDLE - High-strength green paracord can be unwound for emergency survival situations, adding versatility. - CONVENIENT NECK CARRY - Includes a sheath with a neck chain for easy, lightweight transport and quick access; Neck chain length: 12" - VIBRANT VISIBILITY - Bright green paracord handle ensures the knife is easy to spot in any environment. - IMPACT-RESISTANT SHEATH - Securely holds the blade while allowing fast, reliable access when needed. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6" Neon Green Fixed Blade Neck Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Blade, Paracord Handle, Neck Chain Sheath, Survival Knife, Compact Hunting Knife
